title_en: PhD Student · SJTU School of Medicine · AI4Rad Lab
title_cn: 博士研究生 · 上海交通大学医学院 · AI4Rad Lab
bio_en: PhD student at SJTU School of Medicine and a member of AI4Rad Lab. Research focuses on clinical radiology and large language model frameworks for emergency treatment recommendation and clinical decision support.
bio_cn: 上海交通大学医学院博士研究生，AI4Rad Lab 成员。研究方向聚焦临床放射学，以及面向急诊治疗推荐与临床决策支持的大语言模型框架。
interests_en: Large language model frameworks for emergency treatment recommendation
interests_cn: 面向急诊治疗推荐的大语言模型框架

news_en.text: LumbarSR — a paired clinical CT & micro-CT dataset for lumbar vertebra super-resolution — published in Scientific Data (IF 7.2).
HR-LLM-Stroke — a multi-agent LLM framework for emergency stroke treatment recommendation — published in Journal of Medical Internet Research (IF 8.2).

news_cn.text: LumbarSR —— 配对临床 CT 与显微 CT 的腰椎超分辨率数据集，发表于 Scientific Data（IF 7.2）。
HR-LLM-Stroke —— 面向急诊卒中治疗推荐的多智能体大语言模型框架，发表于 Journal of Medical Internet Research（IF 8.2）。
